external_design_anchors.lesson: Signed metadata, file hashes, expiry, rollback/replay resistance are necessary for safe propagation.
external_design_anchors.name: TUF

external_design_anchors.lesson: Transparency logs make metadata tamper-resistant/auditable; Borg does not yet implement this append-only layer.
external_design_anchors.name: Sigstore/Rekor

external_design_anchors.lesson: Artifact metadata should say where, when, and how something was produced; Borg proof packets now need this provenance.
external_design_anchors.name: SLSA provenance

external_design_anchors.lesson: Multiple identities can overpower honest clients; Borg needs outcome-derived tenant independence, not self-reported quorum.
external_design_anchors.name: Federated-learning Sybil/poisoning literature

hard_boundary: Protocol GO is not evidence of maximum agent value, public adoption, or measured external lift.
p0_gaps_to_google_tier: Tie every guidance event to an outcome receipt: exact guidance shown, verification command, worked/failed result, time/tokens/dead-ends avoided.
Deduplicate and generalize traces into canonical atoms before promotion; repeated seed-like traces must not inflate confidence.
Compute tenant quorum from signed independent outcome receipts, not caller-supplied counts at registry ingestion time.
Unify packs, traces, atoms, failure memory, negative evidence, recency, and project context into one scored retrieval/routing API.
Run the 3-condition knowledge-system evaluation: no Borg, empty Borg scaffold, seeded Borg knowledge; report pure knowledge lift separately.
Keep public/self-serve and measured lift NO-GO until first-10 row-derived evidence passes.
